name: TestGetWaitPDUData
title: TestGetWaitPDUData
description: If a valid PDU is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the PDU’s content can be called up with form 1.
Form 2 can only be used for joined events. The number of the joined event (return value of TestJoin...) is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aPDU
parameters.description: PDU variable of type PDU that should be filled in with this function.
